title: Talking About a Friend
learningGoal: Speak fluently about someone else's daily routine, correctly applying the third-person 's' and the negative 'doesn't'.
instructions: 友達のケンについての質問に答えてください。マイクに向かって、「彼は7時に起きます。彼は朝食を食べません。彼は仕事に行きます」と英語で答えてください。動詞の形（wakes, doesn't, goes）に注意しましょう。(Answer a question about your friend Ken. Speak into the microphone and say: 'He wakes up at 7:00. He doesn't eat breakfast. He goes to work.' Pay attention to the verb forms.)
speakingPrompt: Say: 'He wakes up at 7:00. He doesn't eat breakfast. He goes to work.'
scenario: A coworker asks you about your roommate's morning routine.

subTasks.prompt: Say he wakes up at 7:00. (He wakes up at 7:00.)

sampleResponse.targetText: He wakes up at seven o'clock.
sampleResponse.transliteration: ヒー ウェイクス アップ アット セヴン オクロック。

subTasks.prompt: Say he does not eat breakfast. (He doesn't eat breakfast.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: ヒー ダズント イート ブレックファースト。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 彼は朝食を食べません。

subTasks.prompt: Say he goes to work. (He goes to work.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: ヒー ゴーズ トゥ ワーク。

scenarioContext.targetText: What does your roommate Ken do in the morning?
scenarioContext.transliteration: ホワット ダズ ユア ルームメイト ケン ドゥ イン ザ モーニング？
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: あなたのルームメイトのケンは朝何をしますか？

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: He wakes up at seven o'clock.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ヒー ウェイクス アップ アット セヴン オクロック。
ヒー ダズント イート ブレックファースト。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 彼は朝食を食べません。

baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ヒー ゴーズ トゥ ワーク。

expectedSpeakingPoints: Using doesn't and returning eat to the base form
acceptableParaphrases: He wakes up at 7. He doesn't have breakfast. He goes to work.

criteria.name: Grammar (Third-Person S)
criteria.description: Critical use of wakes, doesn't eat, goes.

criteria.name: Pronunciation
criteria.description: Clear pronunciation of the 's' sounds and 'doesn't'.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: He wakes up at 7. He doesn't eat breakfast. He goes to work.

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic speaking! You perfectly controlled the third-person verb forms in real-time.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Focus intensely on the verbs: 'wakes', 'doesn't eat' (no 's' on eat!), and 'goes'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Make sure you clearly pronounce the 'z' sound at the end of 'goes'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: He wakes up at 7:00. He doesn't eat breakfast. He goes to work.

hintText: Remember, after 'doesn't', the verb goes back to normal. So say 'doesn't eat', NOT 'doesn't eats'.
